title: Phase1-v4 regression baseline stale after B0053 roster swap — regenerate (suite red on next pipeline run)
source: Surfaced 2026-05-28 by re-running run_xau_d1 under the B0053 roster.
why: tests/test_regression_phase1.py compares live results/clf_xau_d1/*/summary.json against the frozen tests/fixtures/phase1_v4_baseline.json (catboost roster). B0053 (catboost->lgbm+lr) intentionally changes the numbers, so the suite fails 6/6 on the next real pipeline run. results/ is gitignored so nothing bad is committed, but the suite is red.
value_rationale: Red suite is a trap for the next contributor; cheap fix but needs care.
scope: BLOCKED-ish: pipeline/train.py is currently modified+uncommitted — do NOT regenerate the golden baseline from a dirty tree (would bless unblessed code)
Once train.py changes are committed/settled: run scripts/generate_phase1_baseline.py to refresh, OR retire/replace the Option-B regression test if it has served its purpose

fix(train): B0064 pin xgb+lgbm n_jobs=1 for deterministic, reproducible fits
test(regression): B0064 re-anchor Phase 1 baseline to deterministic lgbm/lr roster

Re-anchored Phase 1 regression baseline to the deterministic lgbm/lr roster. Root-cause investigation (systematic-debugging): ruled out data/feature/config regression; found xgb+lgbm thread-nondeterminism (pinned n_jobs=1) + stale catboost-era snapshot. Fresh deterministic run regenerated baseline; regression suite + full suite green. 2026-05-28.
